item.title: Goldman Sachs General Counsel Kathryn Ruemmler Resigns Over Epstein Ties
item.description: Kathryn Ruemmler, a former top Obama administration lawyer, is out at Goldman Sachs after emails showed a friendship with the sex offender Jeffrey Eps...

item.title: How The Times Is Digging Into Millions of Pages of Epstein Files
item.description: Two dozen journalists. A pile of pages that would reach the top of the Empire State Building. And an effort to find the next revelation in a sprawling...

item.title: San Francisco Teachers End Strike After 4 Days
item.description: Public schools are expected to reopen on Wednesday for 50,000 students in the city. Teachers demanded higher wages and health care benefits.

item.title: U.S. Transfers Thousands of ISIS Prisoners to Iraq From Syria
item.description: The moves appear to highlight lingering doubts in Washington about the new Syrian government’s ability to ensure security.

item.title: What It Means to Be a White ‘Race Traitor’
item.description: From Schwerner and Goodman to Good and Pretti, white people putting themselves in harm’s way has helped galvanize Americans for justice.
